mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_post (user_id, title, content, like_count, comment_count, collect_count, status,update_time,create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, 0, 0, 1,now(),now())

insert into t_comment(post_id, user_id, content, parent_id, to_user_id, like_count, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{dto.postId},#{userId},#{dto.content},#{dto.parentId},#{dto.toUserId},0,1,now(),now())
insert into like_record(user_id, target_id, target_type, create_time, is_cancel) values (#{userId},#{targetId},#{targetType},#{createTime},#{isCancel})
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_post
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{postId} and user_id= #{userId}
update like_record set is_cancel =#{cancel} where target_id=#{id} and user_id=#{userId} and target_type=#{type}
mapper.delete:
delete from t_comment where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_post WHERE status = 1
select id from t_comment where to_user_id = #{id} OR parent_id = #{id}

SELECT t.id, t.user_id, t.title, t.content, t.like_count, t.comment_count, t.collect_count, t.create_time, t.update_time, u.username, t.image, u.status, u.avatar as userImage FROM t_post t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.id = #{postId}

select t.id,u.username as writerName,t.title,t.content,t.like_count,t.comment_count,t.collect_count,t.image from t_post t left join sys_user u on t.user_id = u.id where t.id in
#{num}
